string.text:
The SIG MCX is a family of firearms designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, which features a short-stroke gas piston system to reduce recoil and improve the reliability of the weapon based on the design of the earlier SIG MPX. It features a system that enables conversion between 5.56?45mm NATO, .300 AAC Blackout, and 7.62?39mm ammunition, though it is designed to deliver optimal performance with .300 AAC Blackout and an optional suppressor.
 The SIG MCX VIRTUS is the second generation of the SIG MCX series and was introduced in 2017. This is the model chambered in 5.56x45mm.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]Germany
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2015

The SIG MCX is a family of firearms designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, which features a short-stroke gas piston system to reduce recoil and improve the reliability of the weapon based on the design of the earlier SIG MPX. It features a system that enables conversion between 5.56?45mm NATO, .300 AAC Blackout, and 7.62?39mm ammunition, though it is designed to deliver optimal performance with .300 AAC Blackout and an optional suppressor.
 The SIG MCX RATTLER is a short-barreled variant chambered in .300 AAC Blackout and 5.56, intended to serve as a personal defense weapon. This is the model chambered in 5.56x45mm.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]Germany
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2015

The SIG MCX is a family of firearms designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, which features a short-stroke gas piston system to reduce recoil and improve the reliability of the weapon based on the design of the earlier SIG MPX. It features a system that enables conversion between 5.56?45mm NATO, .300 AAC Blackout, and 7.62?39mm ammunition, though it is designed to deliver optimal performance with .300 AAC Blackout and an optional suppressor.
 The SIG MCX-SPEAR LT is a carbine and the third generation of the SIG MCX line, introduced in 2022. It actually is less of a derivation of the Virtus line, and more of the the MCX-SPEAR rifle, itself a derivation of the whole MCX line. This is the model chambered in 5.56x45mm.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]Germany
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2022

The SIG Sauer MPX submachine gun boasts an unprecedented operation speed in the familiar form factor of the AR platform. Short-stroke gas piston allows SIG MPX to use the full range of 9 mm ammunition without any adjustments to the gas valve. The full-sized mount provides the means of installing a wide range of scopes and sighting devices.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]USA
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2015
